introSection: Circuit Breaker is a steel roller coaster built by Dutch manufacturer Vekoma at Cotaland in Austin, Texas, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The addition of Circuit Breaker was announced in spring 2022. Circuit Breaker opened on October 17, 2025.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 5 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 20 riders per train.

fullText:
Circuit Breaker is a steel roller coaster built by Dutch manufacturer Vekoma at Cotaland in Austin, Texas, USA.

The addition of Circuit Breaker was announced in spring 2022. Circuit Breaker opened on October 17, 2025.



5 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 20 riders per train.
